columns.description: Four-digit year derived from session_date for physical partitioning.
columns.name: session_year

columns.description: XNYS reconstructed historical membership date inherited from S4.
columns.name: session_date

columns.description: Exact case-sensitive provider ticker inherited from S4 without normalization.
columns.name: ticker

columns.description: Always true; every S4 active row is retained exactly once, including unresolved identities.
columns.name: active_on_date

columns.description: Composite-FIGI asset_master sibling-output foreign key; null for candidate, unresolved, or conflicted-unresolved identity evidence. A resolved relationship conflict may retain the exact Composite-FIGI asset_id but remains ineligible.
columns.name: asset_id

columns.description: Share-class parent identity when exact share-class evidence is available; it can parent multiple asset IDs.
columns.name: share_class_id

columns.description: Normalized-CIK issuer_master foreign key when available; never used to generate asset_id.
columns.name: issuer_id

columns.description: ticker_alias interval covering this exact session/ticker when strong identity resolution exists.
columns.name: ticker_alias_id

columns.description: Exact S4 provider type code; no current S2 dictionary value is backfilled into historical rows.
columns.name: type_code

columns.description: Exact S4 primary_exchange candidate MIC as returned at source capture; not historical vintage.
columns.name: primary_exchange_mic

columns.description: Validated ten-digit normalization of the S4 CIK for issuer linking; raw value remains in S4.
columns.name: cik_normalized

columns.description: Exact S4 Composite FIGI and the strongest direct v1 tradable-asset evidence.
columns.name: composite_figi

columns.description: Exact S4 share-class FIGI when present; it defines the parent share-class layer, not asset_id by itself.
columns.name: share_class_figi

columns.description: Exact domain resolved_strong, resolved_conflicted, candidate, unresolved, or conflicted_unresolved. Every value remains in membership DATA; none means generic source quarantine.
columns.name: identity_resolution_status

columns.description: Exact S7 method: source_composite_figi_exact, source_composite_figi_exact_with_relationship_conflict, share_class_date_unique_composite_candidate, share_class_only, cik_issuer_only, ticker_only, or conflict.
columns.name: identity_resolution_method

columns.description: True only for structurally resolved strong mappings with complete asset and alias sibling-output foreign keys and no unresolved security-level conflict. It permits a retrospective identity join only; it does not assert that identity or metadata was historically available as a signal.
columns.name: backtest_identity_eligible

columns.description: Always false in S7; type, exchange, issuer, and other current-reference metadata captured after the historical session may not be used as point-in-time factor values.
columns.name: current_reference_factor_eligible

columns.description: Fixed source_type_code_as_returned_not_historical_dictionary_v1 marker; factor-universe type eligibility is a later policy.
columns.name: security_type_scope

columns.description: Exact S4 universe_source_daily selected parent record ID.
columns.name: selected_source_record_id

columns.description: S4 source candidate count for the session/ticker selection.
columns.name: source_version_count

columns.description: Exact S4 selection status retained without re-selection in S7.
columns.name: source_selection_status

columns.description: Fixed reconstructed_historical_active_membership_v1 marker: the table reduces current-universe survivorship bias but is a retrospective historical-date snapshot, not an archived as-known vintage.
columns.name: membership_time_scope

columns.description: Exact S4 universe_source_daily source_available_session copied for this membership row; it is operational ingestion availability of the reconstructed snapshot, distinct from session_date and identity evidence availability.
columns.name: membership_source_available_session

columns.description: Exact S4 source_availability_quality copied without reinterpretation; fixed reconstructed_historical_snapshot_without_archived_vintage.
columns.name: membership_source_availability_quality

columns.description: Fixed metadata_as_returned_at_source_capture_not_historical_vintage_v1 marker.
columns.name: metadata_time_scope

columns.description: Fixed retrospective_identity_reference_not_signal_v1 marker.
columns.name: identity_mapping_time_scope

columns.description: Maximum source_available_session over the transitive accepted-source evidence closure used for this row's IDs, method, status, hierarchy, eligibility, counts, alias coverage, or conflict disposition; S5 request-status-only coverage is excluded.
columns.name: identity_evidence_available_session

columns.description: Fixed s7_universe_resolution_v1 evidence precedence, temporal join, candidate, and conflict-disposition rule version.
columns.name: resolution_rule_version

columns.description: Exact protected S4 release-set ID.
columns.name: source_s4_release_set_id

columns.description: Exact S5 ticker-event request-status release ID used only for coverage and 404 semantics.
columns.name: source_s5_status_release_id

columns.description: Exact S5 ticker-change-event release ID.
columns.name: source_s5_event_release_id

columns.description: Exact S6 ticker-overview-safe release ID.
columns.name: source_s6_overview_release_id

description: One row for every S4 active session/ticker membership, preserving unresolved rows rather than silently dropping them. Historical inactive observations remain in universe_source_daily; this downstream table is active-only and therefore avoids carrying 43.7 million inactive rows while remaining survivorship-bias safe.
grain: One active S4 membership observation per exact case-sensitive (session_date, ticker), enriched with S7 identity status and lineage.

qa_rules.description: Every output field, order, Arrow type, and nullability must equal this contract.
Every fixed S4 release-set member and fixed S5/S6 release must pass release-manifest, build-manifest, schema, checksum, row-count, and workflow trust-chain verification before use.

Every row and each coordinated member build must bind the exact approved S4 three-release set, S5 request-status release, S5 event release, and S6 overview release; all four builds must share one exact six-dataset source digest and latest-by-time discovery is forbidden.

Every active S4 universe_source_daily row must appear exactly once in DATA; no inactive row may enter and no candidate, unresolved, resolved-conflicted, or conflicted-unresolved active row may be dropped into generic quarantine.

identity_resolution_status must be resolved_strong, resolved_conflicted, candidate, unresolved, or conflicted_unresolved; method must be source_composite_figi_exact, source_composite_figi_exact_with_relationship_conflict, share_class_date_unique_composite_candidate, share_class_only, cik_issuer_only, ticker_only, or conflict; source_selection_status must be singleton, resolved_exact_duplicate, or resolved_unique_latest_last_updated; scope/quality/rule fields must equal their named reconstructed/source-capture/retrospective v1 literals and s7_universe_resolution_v1.

resolved_strong/source_composite_figi_exact requires asset_id and ticker_alias_id, optional independently valid share_class_id/issuer_id, and eligible=true. resolved_conflicted/source_composite_figi_exact_with_relationship_conflict requires asset_id, null alias, independently non-conflicting hierarchy IDs only, and eligible=false. candidate/share_class_date_unique_composite_candidate requires share_class_id, null asset/alias, optional issuer, and eligible=false. unresolved/share_class_only requires share_class_id; unresolved/cik_issuer_only requires issuer_id and null asset/share/alias; unresolved/ticker_only has all four IDs null. conflicted_unresolved/conflict has null asset/alias and may retain only independently exact non-conflicting hierarchy IDs. current_reference_factor_eligible is always false.
source_version_count must be a positive native int64 value.
The active session_date and exact ticker key must be non-null and unique.
active_on_date must be true for every row.
Every selected_source_record_id must resolve to the fixed S4 asset_observation_daily release and match its S4 universe parent.
S4 source_version_count, selection status, membership source availability session, and availability quality must be copied exactly without S7 re-selection or temporal reinterpretation.

identity_evidence_available_session must equal max(source_available_session) over the transitive accepted-source evidence closure used for IDs, method, status, hierarchy, referenced asset/share/issuer/alias state, eligibility, counts, or conflict disposition. The closure starts with this S4 membership row and expands to every participating S4 selected row across sessions/entities, accepted S6 Overview rows, and only accepted S5 ticker_change_event rows admitted by the relevant exact S4/S6 identity attachment rule and, for alias corroboration, the exact unique interval association rule. Unattached/ambiguous S5 events, S5 request status, and sibling output rows are excluded. ticker_only with no derived identity evidence falls back exactly to membership_source_available_session, and conflicts include all competing accepted evidence considered.
In the coordinated group build, every non-null asset_id must resolve to a current asset_master sibling row.

A resolved_strong daily row must reference asset_master.backtest_identity_eligible=true; a resolved_conflicted daily row must reference asset_master.backtest_identity_eligible=false; no other status may carry asset_id.
In the coordinated group build, every non-null issuer_id must resolve to an issuer_master sibling row.
In the coordinated group build, every non-null ticker_alias_id must resolve to exactly one backtest_identity_eligible=true ticker_alias sibling interval covering this exact session/ticker/asset.
resolved_strong rows must have non-null asset_id and ticker_alias_id, consistent Composite-FIGI evidence, and backtest_identity_eligible=true; this rule does not apply to resolved_conflicted.

Candidate, unresolved, resolved-conflicted, and conflicted-unresolved rows must remain backtest_identity_eligible=false; only resolved-conflicted may retain asset_id, none may expose an alias, and exact non-conflicting share_class_id/issuer_id may remain according to the frozen method matrix.
Share-class-only, CIK-only, and ticker-only methods may not populate asset_id or ticker_alias_id.
A source Composite FIGI must reproduce the same asset_id under the frozen asset rule.
Non-null share_class_id and share_class_figi must reproduce each other but may legitimately map to multiple asset IDs.

Every eligible daily row must be covered by exactly one matching alias, and every expanded alias session must map back to exactly one active daily/S4 row with the same exact ticker, asset, and Composite FIGI; no extra alias sessions are allowed.
type_code must equal the S4 source value exactly; S2 is current-only diagnostic and cannot backfill history.
current_reference_factor_eligible must remain false; current-capture type, exchange, issuer reference, name, SIC, and identity metadata cannot become historical factor values.
S5 request-status rows, including HTTP 404, may measure endpoint coverage only and may never create, delete, truncate, or extend a membership or identity link.

No universe row may gain or change asset/share/issuer/alias IDs, identity_resolution_method, identity_resolution_status, interval coverage, or eligibility solely from an S5 ticker_change_event. S5 events contribute only after the relevant identity is independently anchored by accepted S4/S6 evidence and, for alias corroboration, uniquely associated to an already observed interval.

The four sibling outputs must share one ephemeral resolution graph, identical six-release inputs/source digest/binding ID, and passing cross-table QA; sibling staging or unpublished outputs may not be source artifacts.
Membership, metadata, identity scope, and availability must retain their distinct frozen semantics.
Active memberships without a strong security-level identity remain visible and excluded from backtests.
Unique Share-class- or ticker-date candidates remain non-eligible until a separately approved promotion rule exists.
Active CS rows lacking a strong eligible identity require an explicit coverage review before factor-universe use.
Composite-to-share-class temporal ambiguity or overlapping incompatible share classes remain visible as resolved_conflicted or conflicted_unresolved DATA rows and must never become eligible.

The 169 S6 pending evidence-quarantine issues and 193 S5 event-quarantine issues are release-authenticated and reconciled at build level; they cannot be silently promoted or automatically mapped onto membership rows.
